data.name: NO, THANK YOU!!!
data.detailed_description:
You play as Haru, a man who seems to be a kind soul that saved one of the bartenders at sótano from a car crash. However, neither Haru nor the staff of sótano are the men they appear to be at first glance. Flirt with the sexy men running the bar. Grow close and intimate with them. Uncover the secrets of this detective agency in-disguise. All while you lay your preparations to—NO, THANK YOU!!!

Enjoy a dark mystery lying behind a comic veneer and uncover the secrets each character harbors in order to reach each man's true endings.

Both the protagonist and all the romanceable men are fully voiced, even during the sex scenes! Enjoy the wonderful talents of Furukawa Tetsuto (Trinity Universe), Murakami Kazuya (Hakuouki), Tamaru Ryu (Touken Ranbu, Samurai Flamenco), and more!

Throughout the game, the "NO, THANK YOU!!!" button will appear at key, critical moments, and it's up to you to decide whether to proceed, or reject the choice the protagonist is about to make. What choices are those? That's a mystery you'll have to intuit from the story! Just know that choosing wrongly can lead to fatal consequences!

(Note: A Hint Mode which reveals more of the protagonist's thoughts is unlocked after your first playthrough.)

What choices are those? That's a mystery you'll have to intuit from the story! Just know that choosing wrongly can lead to fatal consequences!

data.short_description: NO, THANK YOU!!! is a dark, dramatic mystery hidden behind a comic veneer as all of the men in this yaoi visual novel harbor their own secrets. Uncover the mystery behind the protagonist and this bar disguising a detective agency while flirting with the guys and growing intimate with them.
data.reviews:
“The art is gorgeous, the plot is unique and interesting, the characters are a lot of fun and the configuration bonuses are like little gems.”
Rice Digital

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP and up
  • 處理器: Pentium III 1GHz
  • 記憶體: 256 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: VRAM 8MB
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 處理器: Pentium 4 1.5GHz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: VRAM 16MB
